headline: Chinese Automakers Take Aim at a Big Ford Money-Maker
summary: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em. That's exactly how Ford is viewing its newest threat to a big money-maker in Europe.

headline: This is how Ford CEO Jim Farley "future proofs" F-Series trucks
summary: When you're the best at something, there is never a shortage of challengers working to take your spot, and lately, Ford may be suffering a bit from its success. Ford F-Series trucks have been America's best-selling truck brand for 49 consecutive years, and in 2025, it wrapped up its 44th ...

headline: Jim Farley Has Promised Cheaper Fords. Here’s What That Means for Investors.
summary: Ford (NYSE: F) CEO Jim Farley has signaled the company’s direction: “We need to do a great job as a brand, and as an industry, to make our vehicles more affordable. I think you’re certainly going to see that at Ford over the next couple of years.” For a stock held largely for its 4.9% ... Jim Farley Has Promised Cheaper Fords. Here’s What That Means for Investors.

headline: Ford (F) Appoints Maria Ricciardone as Chief Investor Relations Officer
summary: Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) is one of the best high volume stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. On April 30, Ford Motor Company appointed Maria Ricciardone as chief investor relations officer, effective May 1. Joining from Lockheed Martin, where she led treasury and investor relations, Ricciardone succeeds Lynn Antipas Tyson, who will move […]
